evidence.snippet:
Robotics/UAV Lithium Batteries
------------------------------
For over 20 years we've specialized in LiPo and Lithium ion batteries designed specifically for drones, unmanned vehicles, autonomous systems(UAVs, UGVs, AUVs) and robotic applications.
Lithium Batteries Assembled In The USA

items.notes: LiPo, Li-ion, and LiFePO4 battery packs designed for UAVs, UGVs, AUVs and robotics; core product line

products_categories.notes: All products are batteries or battery accessories (chargers, connectors, bags); power_systems is the only applicable category

evidence.snippet: Assembled in the USA
Lithium Batteries Assembled In The USA

headquarters.notes: Site consistently says 'Assembled in the USA'. Terms of service reference laws of the State of Washington but that line exceeds citation cap. About/Our Team pages were skipped so city/state cannot be confirmed from corpus.

evidence.snippet:
Robotics/UAV Lithium Batteries
------------------------------
For over 20 years we've specialized in LiPo and Lithium ion batteries designed specifically for drones, unmanned vehicles, autonomous systems(UAVs, UGVs, AUVs) and robotic applications.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells lithium battery packs as components for drone/UAV/UGV/AUV platforms; also resells third-party chargers (iCharger, ISDT) and accessories as supporting products

products.notes: Battery packs are the primary product; chargers (iCharger/ISDT brands) and accessories are supporting lines. Drone-specific collections for Inspired Flight IF1200A, Freefly Alta X, Wispr Ranger Pro 1100, Acecore Technologies NOA.

evidence.snippet: Assembled in the USA
Lithium Batteries Assembled In The USA

ndaa.notes: Site repeatedly claims 'Assembled in the USA' but makes no NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim. 'Assembled in the USA' does not satisfy NDAA component-sourcing requirements.

blue_uas.notes: No mention of Blue UAS or Blue sUAS anywhere in the corpus.

readiness.notes: Sells extensive catalog of battery SKUs at listed retail prices; also offers custom-built-to-order batteries. Primary model is production/made-to-order.

tagline: Manufactures USA-assembled lithium battery packs (LiPo, Li-ion, LiFePO4) in 1S–22S configurations and compatible chargers for commercial unmanned systems. One SKU carries NDAA compliance; NDAA and Blue UAS status for broader product lines remains undocumented. Public evidence of defense primes' integration or government contracts is sparse.
